title: Halloween Table Decorations 18 Inch 36 LED Halloween Willow Tree with Pumpkin Bat Ghost Lights, Timer/USB/Battery Operated Black Halloween Tree Spooky Halloween Decorations Indoor Home Party Room Gift
features: Light Up Halloween Decorations - Our Black Halloween willow tree with 24 LED orange purple white Lights (8 LEDs per color) and 12 pumpkin bat ghost lights (4 lights per pattern). Looking fun and spooky, you can use them to create a wonderful halloween atmosphere for your home or party

USB & Battery Powered - Our Halloween table decorations tree lihgts has two power modes for you to choose from, one powered by 3 AA batteries (batteries not included), and the other powered by USB cable (included)

Easy to Use & Timer Function - Since this battery operated halloween lights can also be used without a plug, you can decorate it anywhere you want. And you can use the switch on the base to set the timer so that the light up Halloween tree automatically turns on for 6 hours and off for 18 hours a day

Adjustable Branches - The flexible branches are bendable and you can easily adjust the shape of the halloween tree after receiving it to make it the ideal natural tree shape. There are buttons on the base to control the balck halloween tree
